items.title: Drones detected above Washington DC Army base where Pete Hegseth and Marco Rubio live, report says
items.deck: Officials are weighing whether to relocate the defense secretary and the secretary of state from Fort Lesley J.

items.title: In Swaths of Germany, the Far-Right AfD Is Part of the Fabric
items.deck: The Alternative for Germany party, or AfD, is shunned in federal politics but is a regional force.

items.title: Ozempic Is About to Go Generic in India, China and Canada
items.deck: In India, China and several other nations, Novo Nordisk is on the verge of losing patent protection for its blockbuster weight loss drug, opening the door for cheaper competing versions.

items.title: Silicon Valley Bet on War. The Bets Are Paying Off.
items.deck: After years of criticism and financial risk, Palantir, Anthropic and small start-ups are generating rewards from their investments in defense tech.

items.title: Olympics star Rohan Dennis breaks his silence for the first time since dodging jail over his wife's death - and his four-word statement will chill you to the bone
items.deck: The former world champion cyclist had not been heard from since walking free from court in May last year.
